Export.Routine: DVPTCP ;;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform TCP Utilities ; 5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ;Per VHA directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. QUIT ; ; -- called from protocol action at START^DVPTCPL START(DVPPORT,DVPCFG) ; ; ; -- set up environment NEW DVPOK SET DVPOK=0 SET U="^" DO HOME^%ZIS ; ; -- if no port, set to default IF $GET(DVPPORT)="" NEW DVPPORT SET DVPPORT=9201 ; ;IF $$LOCK(DVPPORT) DO ;. DO UNLOCK(DVPPORT) ;. ; -- JOB command same for CacheNT and DSM JOB LISTENER^DVPTCPL(DVPPORT,$GET(DVPCFG))::5 SET DVPOK=$TEST ;ELSE DO ;. SET DVPOK=0 QUIT DVPOK ; UCX ; -- old VMS TCPIP (UCX) multi-thread entry point [for DSM] ; -- Called from VistALink .com files ; NEW DVPEC DO ESET SET (IO,IO(0))="SYS$NET" ; **VMS specific code, need to share device** OPEN IO:(TCPDEV:BLOCKSIZE=512):60 ELSE SET ^TMP("DVP DSM CONNECT FAILURE",$HOROLOG)="" QUIT USE IO SET DVPEC=$$NEWOK^DVPTCPL() IF DVPEC DO LOGINERR^DVPTCPL(DVPEC,IO) IF 'DVPEC DO SPAWN^DVPVLL QUIT ; CACHEVMS ; -- VMS TCPIP (UCX) multi-thread entry point for Cache for VMS ; -- Called from VistALink .com files ; NEW DVPEC DO ESET SET (IO,IO(0))="SYS$NET" ; OPEN IO::5 USE IO:(::"-M") ;Packet mode like DSM ; SET DVPEC=$$NEWOK^DVPTCPL() IF DVPEC DO LOGINERR^DVPTCPL(DVPEC,IO) IF 'DVPEC DO SPAWN^DVPVLL QUIT ; CACHELNX ; -- multi-thread entry point for Cache for Linux ; -- Called from XINETD service files ; NEW DVPEC DO ESET SET (IO,IO(0))=$PRINCIPAL ; OPEN IO::5 USE IO:(::"-M") ;Packet mode like DSM ; SET DVPEC=$$NEWOK^DVPTCPL() IF DVPEC DO LOGINERR^DVPTCPL(DVPEC,IO) IF 'DVPEC DO SPAWN^DVPVLL QUIT ; GTMLNX ; -- Linux xinetd multi-thread entry point for GT.M ; NEW DVPEC,TMP,X,% DO ESET ; ; **GTM/linux specific code** SET (IO,IO(0))=$P,@("$ZT=""""") X "U IO:(nowrap:nodelimiter:IOERROR=""TRAP"")" ;Setup device S @("$ZINTERRUPT=""I $$JOBEXAM^ZU($ZPOSITION)"""),X="" X "ZSHOW ""D"":TMP" F %=1:1 Q:'$D(TMP("D",%)) S X=TMP("D",%) Q:X["LOCAL" S IO("IP")=$P($P(X,"REMOTE=",2),"@"),IO("PORT")=+$P($P(X,"LOCAL=",2),"@",2) ;End GT.M code ; SET DVPEC=$$NEWOK^DVPTCPL() IF DVPEC DO LOGINERR^DVPTCPL(DVPEC,IO) IF 'DVPEC DO COUNT^XUSCNT(1),SPAWN^DVPTCPL,COUNT^XUSCNT(-1) QUIT ; ;Sample linux scripts ;xinetd script ;vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv ;service vistalink ;{ ; socket_type = stream ; port = 18001 ; type = UNLISTED ; user = vista ; wait = no ; disable = no ; server = /bin/bash ; server_args = /home/vista/dev/vistalink.sh ; passenv = REMOTE_HOST ;} ;^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ; ;cat /home/vista/dev/vistalink.sh ;vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv ;#!/bin/bash ;#RPC Broker ;cd /home/vista/dev ;. ./gtmprofile ;$gtm_dist/mumps -r GTMLNX^DVPTCP ;exit 0 ;^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ; SERVICE ; -- service entry point (for VMS TCP/IP & LINUX XINETD utilities) ; TODO: possible single entry point for os service calls; needs work and has not been tested NEW DVPEC,DVPMOS,DVPSOS DO ESET SET DVPMOS=$$OS^DVPSKT() IF DVPMOS'["OpenM" SET $ECODE=",U98," SET DVPSOS=$$SYSOS^DVPSKT(DVPMOS) IF DVPMOS'["VMS"!(DVPMOS'["UNIX") SET $ECODE=",U97," ; SET (IO,IO(0))=$SELECT(DVPSOS="VMS":"SYS$NET","UNIX":$PRINCIPAL) ; OPEN IO::5 USE IO:(::"-M") ;Packet mode like DSM ; SET DVPEC=$$NEWOK^DVPTCPL() IF DVPEC DO LOGINERR^DVPTCPL(DVPEC,IO) IF 'DVPEC DO SPAWN^DVPTCPL QUIT ; ESET ;Set initial error trap SET U="^",$ETRAP="D ^%ZTER H" ;Set up the error trap N $ET,$ES ; S $ET="S E=$$ERR^DVPERR($NA(^TMP(""DVP_TARGET"",$J)))" ;Set up the error trap ; All Public functions return DVPERR. ; A value of 1 = Successful call with results in the TARGET array ; A value of 0 = Error occurred somewhere with details in the OperationOutcome response S DVPERR=1 QUIT ; STARTUP ; -- called by TaskMan startup option [Option: DVP LISTENER STARTUP] ; and could be called by VMS .com procedure ; ; -- quit if not Cache OS IF $$GETOS()'["OpenM" GOTO STARTUPQ ; -- clear log of non-active listeners DO CLEARLOG ; -- get config for BOX-VOL and start it! DO STARTCFG($$GETCFG()) STARTUPQ ; QUIT ; CLEARLOG ; -- clear log of non-active listeners NEW DIK,DA,Y,DVPI,DVP0,DVPPORT ; SET DVPI=0 ;FOR SET DVPI=$ORDER(^XOB(18.04,XOBI)) QUIT:'XOBI DO ;. SET XOB0=$GET(^XOB(18.04,XOBI,0)) ;. SET XOBPORT=+$PIECE(XOB0,U,2) ;. ; -- make sure listener is not running ;. IF $$LOCK(XOBPORT) DO ;. . SET DIK="^XOB(18.04,",DA=XOBI DO ^DIK ;. . DO UNLOCK(XOBPORT) ; QUIT ; STARTCFG(DVPCFG) ; -- start a configurations listeners ; -- Commented out for DVP Q ; -- NEW CFG0,LSTR,LSTR0,DVPPORT,STARTUP,DVPOK ;SET CFG0=$GET(^XOB(18.03,XOBCFG,0)) ; ; -- quit if no configuration IF CFG0="" GOTO CFGQ ; ; -- quit if not Cache...for now! IF $$GETOS()'["OpenM" GOTO CFGQ ; SET LSTR=0 FOR SET LSTR=$ORDER(^XOB(18.03,XOBCFG,"PORTS",LSTR)) QUIT:'LSTR DO . SET LSTR0=$GET(^XOB(18.03,XOBCFG,"PORTS",LSTR,0)) . SET XOBPORT=+$PIECE(LSTR0,U,1) . SET STARTUP=$PIECE(LSTR0,U,2) . ; . ; -- if ok to start, port # defined and not already started . IF XOBPORT,STARTUP,$$LOCK^DVPTCP(XOBPORT) DO . . DO UNLOCK(XOBPORT) . . DO UPDATE^DVPTCP(DVPPORT,1,DVPCFG) . . SET DVPOK=$$START(DVPPORT,DVPCFG) . . ;IF 'DVPOK DO UPDATE(DVPPORT,5,DVPCFG) ; CFGQ ; QUIT ; LOCK(DVPPORT) ;-- Lock port ; -- Commented out Q 1 ; -- ; ; Used to prevent another process from attempting to start the Listener ; when it is already running. ; ; Input: ; DVPPORT - Port # ; ; Output: ; Function Value - Returns 1 if lock was successful, 0 otherwise ; QUIT $$ACTION("LOCK",DVPPORT) ; ; UNLOCK(DVPPORT) ;-- Unlock port ; -- Commented out Q ; -- ; ; Used to release a lock created by $$LOCK. ; ; Input: ; DVPPORT - Port # ; ; Output: ; None ; NEW X SET X=$$ACTION("UNLOCK",DVPPORT) QUIT ; ACTION(ACTION,DVPPORT) ; -- do lock action NEW ENV,VOL,UCI,BOX ; SET DVPPORT=+$GET(DVPPORT) ; SET ENV=$$GETENV() SET VOL=$PIECE(ENV,U,2) SET UCI=$PIECE(ENV,U) SET BOX=$PIECE(ENV,U,4) ; ;IF ACTION="LOCK",DVPPORT LOCK +^XOB(18.01,"VistALink Listener",VOL,UCI,BOX,XOBPORT):1 QUIT $TEST ;IF ACTION="UNLOCK",XOBPORT LOCK -^XOB(18.01,"VistALink Listener",VOL,UCI,BOX,XOBPORT) QUIT 1 QUIT 0 ; ; UPDATE(DVPPORT,DVPSTAT,DVPCFG) ; -- update VISTALINK LISTENER STARTUP LOG for listener ; -- Commented out Q ; -- NEW DIC,Y,X,DVPBOX SET DVPBOX=$$GETBOXN() ; ; -- set up lookup call ;SET DIC="^XOB(18.04," ;SET DIC(0)="MLX" ;SET DIC("DR")=".02////"_XOBPORT ;SET DIC("S")="IF $P(^(0),U,2)="_XOBPORT ;SET X=XOBBOX ; ;DO ^DIC ; -- quit if lookup failed ;IF +Y>0 DO UPDLOG(+Y,DVPPORT,XOBSTAT,$GET(XOBCFG)) QUIT ; UPDLOG(XOBDA,XOBPORT,XOBSTAT,XOBCFG) ; -- do edit ; -- Commented out Q ; -- NEW DA,DIE,DR,Y,X ; LOCK +^XOB(18.04,XOBDA,0) ; -- set basic fields SET DA=XOBDA SET DIE="^XOB(18.04," SET DR=".02////"_XOBPORT_";.03////"_XOBSTAT_";.05////^S X=$$NOW^XLFDT" ; -- set config if defined, otherwise delete SET DR=DR_";.06////"_$SELECT($GET(XOBCFG)]"":XOBCFG,1:"@") ; -- set user if defined, otherwise delete SET DR=DR_";.04////"_$SELECT($GET(DUZ)]"":DUZ,1:"@") ; DO ^DIE LOCK -^XOB(18.04,XOBDA,0) ; QUIT ; GETENV() ; -- get environment variable ;-- Get environment of current system i.e. Y=UCI^VOL/DIR^NODE^BOX LOOKUP NEW Y DO GETENV^%ZOSV QUIT Y ; GETOS() ;-- Get operating system ; ; This function will determine which operating system is being used. ; ; Input: ; None ; ; Output: ; Operating system value i.e. OpenM-NT for OpenM. ; ;-- Get operating system QUIT $PIECE($GET(^%ZOSF("OS")),"^") ; ; GETBOX() ; -- get box ien ; QUIT $$FIND1^DIC(14.7,"","BX",$PIECE($$GETENV(),U,4),"","","") ; GETBOXN() ; -- get box name ; QUIT $PIECE($$GETENV(),U,4) ; GETCFG() ; -- get config ien for current BOX-VOL pair QUIT +$PIECE($GET(^XOB(18.01,1,"CONFIG",+$ORDER(^XOB(18.01,1,"CONFIG","B",+$$GETBOX(),"")),0)),U,2) ;
